titleStmt.title: SII 39.100: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 100. (A.R. No. 100 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. KAKŌLANATHA TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL (PĀṆḌYA).,-13TH CENTURY A.D.

summary.p: This inscription refers to the gift of land situated in the village of Śirukuḍi in Vaḍapirappunāḍu to the shrine of Āḷuḍaiyapiḷḷaiyār built by him, for offerings during the service called Buvaṉēkaviraṉśandi, named after the king. Poṉpaṟṟi-uḍaiyāṉ Uyyavandāṉ Sūryadēvaṇ alias Gāngeyaṉ of Siṟumarudūr in Vaḍaveḷḷāru alias Sundarapāṇḍya vaḷanāḍu figures as signatory. Taxes like Antarāyam, Poṉvari, Vinīyōgam Veṭṭibāṭṭam, Pañjupili, Sandivikirappēru, Vāsalperu, Elāñjinai-peru, Tarirai, Taṭṭolibāṭṭam, Āṭṭuvari, Kāṭṭuvari, iḍaiyarvari inavari etc.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī Aruḷicceyal poṉṉamarāpati
paṟṟu puṟamalai nāṭṭut tirukkoḷakkuṭi
Uṭaiyār tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiyaṉāyaṉār
tirukkoyil tāṉattāṟkku Ikkoyilil nām
Eḻuntaruḷuvit tiruñāṉam peṟṟa Āḷuṭaiya pi
ḷḷaiyāṟkku namperāl kaṭṭiṉa puvaṉekaviraṉ canti
kku Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi Uḷḷuṭṭu veṇṭum nitta nima
ntaṅkaḷukku vaṭapiṟappu nāṭṭuc ciṟukuṭippāl na
ṉ veṇṭotta perunāṉ kellaikkuḷppaṭṭa nirnilattil veṇ
ṭakaṉ nāyaṉār paḻantevatāṉam nikki nikki Uḷḷa nilamum Ikkuḷattil
Iṟakki kaṭṭiṉa ciṟuveṇṭakaṉ muṟṟumāka perunāṉ kellaikkuḷpaṭ
ṭa naṉcey puṉcey nattamun toṭṭamum kuḷamum kuḷappirippu meṉokkiya
maramuṅ kiḻṇokkiya kiṇaṟum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭaṉavum Uḷpaṭa Aṇṇāvikku
Āṟāvatu taimmāta mutal Iṟaiyili tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka kuṭuttu Iṉāḷ muta
l Ivvūr kaṭamai Antarāyam poṉvari viṉiyokam veṭṭipāṭṭam
mañcupili cantuvikkiṟakap peṟum vācalpeṟu Ilāñciṉaippeṟu taṟiyi
ṟai cekkiṟai taṭṭolip pāṭṭam Āṭṭuvari kāṭṭuvari Iṭaiyarvari Iṉavari
Īḻam puṉcey Āyamaṟkkum maṟṟum Eppeṟppaṭṭa Iṟaikaḷum tavittu
Ippaṭikku nam variyilār kaṇakkilum kaḻippatākavum coṉṉom
Ippaṭikku nāṉkellaiyilum tiruccūlat tāpaṉamum paṇ
ṇi cattirātittavaṟc celvatāka kallilum cempilum
veṭṭik koḷka Ivai vaṭaveḷḷāṟāṉa cuntarapāṇṭiya va
ḷa nāṭṭu ciṟumarutūr poṉpaṟṟi Uṭaiyāṉ Uyyavantā
ṉ cūriyatevaṉāṉa kāṅkeyaṉṉeḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 39.100 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
